@sigil v0 hybrid
G: decide(microservices)
C: teamof6 ∧ part-timeDevOps ∧ 4monthtimeline ∧ PostgreSQLdata-store
H: scalability ∧ modularity ∧ teamflexibility ⇒ prefer(microservices)
P: setupmicroservicesarchitecture → developbillingandsimplecoreapp → ensureCI/CDintegration → monitorperformance
R: ! heavytouchpointmanagement ∧ ! increasedcomplexityearlyon ∧ ! overheadforDevOps
A: microservicesallowscaling ∧ enablesfuturedevelopment

[AUDIT]
Architecturedecisiondocumented.
